action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 12 failed because the local verification command referenced './test.pt' which did not exist; the eval was skipped. The checkpoint from iteration 11 (CLIP ViT-B/16 + cosine head + full replay) exists at checkpoints/model.pt. The predict.py code itself is correct and matches the eval contract. Analysis: I need to verify predict.py with a properly created dummy test file, then submit the checkpoint for evaluation to see if CLIP outperforms the previous best of 83.11% (IN21k). Decision: Run a quick local sanity check using a temporary directory with a copy of val.pt as test.pt, then submit the checkpoint for evaluation.
action.command: mkdir -p /tmp/dummy_test && cp $RAB_DATA_DIR/val.pt /tmp/dummy_test/test.pt && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/dummy_test --checkpoint checkpoints/model.pt --output /tmp/dummy_out.json && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/dummy_out.json')); print('predictions length:', len(d['predictions']))"
